compiled_state.title: [dso-config]: test_gate.batch_threshold=100 < preplanning test count 377 -> CI failure
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview
test-record-test-status-batch-threshold.sh fails in CI with 'preplanning/SKILL.md test count (377) <= batch_threshold (100)'.
Root cause: .test-index now maps 377 tests to preplanning/SKILL.md (grew from ~87 when threshold was raised to 100). The threshold is no longer sufficient.
Fix: Raise test_gate.batch_threshold in .claude/dso-config.conf from 100 to 400.
